The question is asking to identify the first five-year interval where the number of deaths per year exceeded 100,000. To find this, we need to sort the data based on the "deaths per year" column in the order of "small to large" using the f_sort_column(deaths per year) operation. This will help us see the progression of deaths per year and determine when the number first surpassed 100,000.
The first interval of five years to have more than 100,000 deaths was 1965-1970, with 105,000 deaths.
